channel.title: Coovachilli on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Coovachilli on Pi Stack

item.title: CoovaChilli vs pfSense Captive Portal vs MikroTik User Manager: Self-Hosted Captive Portal Guide 2026
item.description: Captive portals are the gatekeepers of public and semi-public wireless networks. They intercept unauthenticated users, present a login or acceptance page, and only grant network access after verification. From coffee shops and hotels to corporate guest networks and municipal Wi-Fi, captive portals are ubiquitous — and running them on self-hosted infrastructure keeps user data, authentication logs, and access policies under your control.
